howItWorks.intro: This laundromat income calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Revenue
rules.formula: Revenue = (Washers × Turns × Wash$ + Dryers × Turns × Dry$) × 30
rules.explanation: Daily machine revenue extrapolated to monthly.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: What is the average laundromat profit margin?
faq.a: Net margins typically range from 20-40% depending on rent and utilities.

faq.q: How many turns per day is good?
faq.a: 4-6 turns per machine per day is average. 7+ is excellent.
